title: Recover the Max Heap After Removal of Duplicate Elements
subCategory: Heapify the Array while Preserving the Uniqueness of Elements

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: Input is a binary array where a smaller value is stored at the left child and a larger value is stored at the right child.
statement.outputFormat: Return True if the heap property is satisfied otherwise return False
statement.notes: The array may contain duplicate elements. You cannot remove duplicates from the array

examples.explanation: the given input is not a heap property

testCases.input: First line count, second line elements (stdin match)
